case_title: SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY VS. CSI CUSTOMER SERVICE GENERAL CONTRACTOR et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CSI CUSTOMER SERVICE GENERAL CONTRACTOR OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY - MS: DEBBIE TRIUNFOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-10-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY - MS: DEBBIE TRIUNFOL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAY-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CSI CUSTOMER SERVICE GENERAL CONTRACTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-29-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE TO MID-JANUARY, 2012. LAST PAYMENT OT NE MADE BY JANUARY 1, 2012. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY - MS: DEBBIE TRIUNFOL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-19-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CSI CUSTOMER SERVICE GENERAL CONTRACTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "TO DETERMINE STATUS OF DEFENDANT BANKRUPTCY & WHETHER ADDITIONAL PAYMENTS CAN BE MADE TO PLAINTIFF. THREE PAYMENTS REMAIN--2 X $500.00. 1 X 624.00", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CSI CUSTOMER SERVICE GENERAL CONTRACTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT PRODUCED A "DISCHARGE OF DEBTS" AND STATED THAT PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT WAS INCLUDED IN HER PETITION. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
